name: noir_city
description: Noir urban settings — rain, neon, shadows
setting_pool: A rain-slick city street at night
A dimly lit apartment overlooking an alley
A smoke-filled office with a desk lamp
A jazz club backstage at 2 AM
A rooftop garden above the city lights

background_pool.text: The rain-soaked streets of {setting}, wet asphalt reflecting neon signs in streaks of red and blue, steam rising from grates, distant headlights smearing through the downpour
The cramped interior of {setting}, peeling wallpaper and water stains, a single bare bulb or desk lamp casting harsh shadows, dust motes in the cone of light
The narrow alleys and service ways behind {setting}, fire escapes overhead creating geometric shadow patterns, the glow of a streetlight at the far end cutting through mist
The claustrophobic atmosphere of {setting}, low ceiling and dense cigarette haze, silhouettes of instruments and equipment, the glow of a jukebox or stage light
The windswept elevation of {setting}, tar-paper and gravel surface, low brick ledges overlooking a sea of city lights, the distant hum of traffic far below
The dashboard of a parked sedan outside {setting}, pebbled-glass windshield beaded with rain, the glow of a streetlamp through the windscreen, a cigarette burning in the ashtray
The doorway of {setting}, peeling paint on the jamb, a bare bulb in a wire cage overhead, shadows pooling in the stairwell beyond, the close press of a narrow entrance hall
The stairwell of {setting}, worn marble steps and iron railing, a window at each landing casting grey rectangles of light, echoes bouncing off hard surfaces
The sidewalk café across from {setting}, metal chairs and round tables under a faded awning, a newspaper folded on an empty seat, the blur of traffic beyond a row of planter boxes
The city skyline beyond {setting}, rooftops and water tanks silhouetted against a bruised sky, the geometry of fire escapes and chimneypots, distant bridges and towers fading into haze

subject_pool: a private detective in a rumpled trench coat
a femme fatale in a tailored dress and gloves
a uniformed cop on the take
a nightclub singer in a sequined gown
a bookie with a pencil behind his ear
a newspaper man with a pressed fedora
a dock worker with rough hands and a limp
a secretary with a knowing look and sharp red lipstick
a corrupt cop with a loose tie and bloodshot eyes
a lounge singer in a sequined gown
a bookie with a notebook and a pencil behind the ear
a reluctant witness clutching a handbag
action_pool: lighting a cigarette with shaking hands
squinting through the rain at something distant
slipping a photograph into a coat pocket
checking the cylinder of a revolver
straightening a tie and composing their face
holding a glass of whiskey, not drinking
lighting a match with a thumbnail
adjusting a garter strap beneath the table
scanning the room in the bar mirror
fidgeting with a worn wedding ring
